TimeEntry.Title: CCC-DC-SQL-02 :Updated with latest Cisco Secure Client Version: 5.1.11.388-COMPLETED

TimeEntry.Title: Re: Virus
TimeEntry.Notes:
Re: Virus 

User Chuck reported seeing pop-up virus ads on his computer. After investigation, I identified and blocked the malicious source link responsible for triggering the ads. A full system malware scan was performed to verify there were no active threats or infections. The computer is now confirmed safe and operating normally. 

Actions Taken: 

  • Blocked the malicious source link. 

  • Performed a full malware scan and verified system integrity. 

  • Confirmed the issue is resolved and device is secure.

TimeEntry.Title: Failed Veeam backups for CCC
TimeEntry.Notes: While monitoring the Veeam backups for CCC from the VSPC admin console, found that the backups had failed. Connected to the TE-DC-BK-VBR-01 server and troubleshot the issue. After that, retried the backup job, and the backups have now completed successfully

TimeEntry.Title: DESKTOP-4TTOOKT : Patch update as APD failed
TimeEntry.Notes: DESKTOP-4TTOOKT : Patch update as APD failed, It was a Dell display driver. I downloaded and installed it successfully by accessing the machine through MyRemote. After the update, I scanned the MYRMM portal and confirmed that the driver was updated.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Snapshot consolidation required - CCC-DC-TSVDI-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server CCC-DC-TSVDI-01 is on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: Prepared the Windows 10 computer details for CCC as per Lead instructions.
TimeEntry.Notes: Prepared the Windows 10 computer inventory for CCC as per the instructions from Lead (Gurdeep) and sent the details to all leads via email.

TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server CCC-DC-AD-01 is on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: My Remote stuck on the CCC-DC-AD-01
TimeEntry.Notes:
login to my remote and checked the screen was freezing while trying to log in to the server. Log in to the server through myrmm and check the screenconnect service. restart the services and check again. Now it is working fine hence closing this ticket

 

Server name :CCC-DC-AD-01

TimeEntry.Title: Snapshot consolidation required - CCC-DC-AD-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server CCC-DC-AD-01 is on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: Datastore Migration to New Nimbus for CCC.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the vCenter and then start migrating the VMs to the new datastore for CCC Servers. After migration power on the VMs and then bring them online on network. Start and verify all the services are up and running properly on all servers.

TimeEntry.Title: CCC-DC-AD-01 server was showing offline in my remote portal
TimeEntry.Notes: While checking the server status on the My Remote portal, found that the server CCC-DC-AD-01 was showing as offline. Checked the server connectivity by pinging its IP from another server, and it was reachable. Logged into the ManageEngine portal and confirmed that the server was up. Connected to the server and found the ScreenConnect services were stuck, so restarted the services. The server is now showing online in the My Remote portal

TimeEntry.Title: Upgrade VMWare tools - CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01.
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login to the vCenter and check the following machines needs to upgrade the VMware tool on it. Go to the VM and the initiate upgrade VMware tool on the machine successfully.

CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01.

TimeEntry.Title: Upgrade VMWare tools - CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01.
TimeEntry.Notes:
Login to the vCenter and check the following machines needs to upgrade the VMware tool on it. Go to the VM and the initiate upgrade VMware tool on the machine successfully.

CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01.

TimeEntry.Title: Old laptop that has Administrative locks on it
TimeEntry.Notes: Debra, a client, called for assistance with her old laptop's Wi-Fi connectivity. I helped her by guiding her to install MyRemote to resolve the issue. After fixing the Wi-Fi, I prepared the laptop for personal use by removing technician tools and running pending updates. Since Windows updates were restricted due to domain policies, I planned to disconnect the laptop from the domain. A meeting was scheduled for 1 p.m. PST the following day to walk Debra through the process of upgrading her laptop to Windows 11 and transitioning it for personal use.

TimeEntry.Title: Old laptop that has Administrative locks on it
TimeEntry.Notes: I had a scheduled call with Debra at 1PM PST to guide her through the process of removing her laptop from the domain. I logged into her computer and explained the process, then proceeded to remove the device from the domain. Afterward, I created a local user for her and ran Windows security updates. We reviewed her laptop's specifications and found it didn’t meet the requirements for Windows 11, which I informed her about. I also checked her update policy in the office portal, enrolled it, and confirmed updates will continue until October 2026. Finally, I logged into her email, installed all Office apps (Excel, Word, Outlook), and ensured the computer is now ready for her personal use.

TimeEntry.Title: Clean up backup storage in DC.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into QNAP storage for BKP-CCC and then start cleaning up the space on the qnap. Delete old snapshots and old data from the storage LUN to clear the space on LUN. After that rescan the storage on VBR and then verify the storage location has clear all warning alerts from it.

TimeEntry.Title: Snapshot consolidation required - CCC-DC-SQL-02
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server CCC-DC-SQL-02 is on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: I am unable to use my Excel Workbook on my work computer today ???
TimeEntry.Notes: Debra Platis reported she was unable to use her Excel workbook on her work computer. Logged into her system and found she was experiencing login issues. Disabled her authentication in Microsoft 365 to reset access, then discovered that E3 licenses were unavailable. Assigned her a Microsoft 365 Standard license instead, and then reinstalled 365 apps restoring her Excel access successfully.

TimeEntry.Title: Home Office computer
TimeEntry.Notes:
Charles reported an issue that he is not able to send the PDF attachment....

so connect to his computer and checked that he has already sent the email...

However he said that he has not received the confirmation email from the user....

so checked the mailbox and informed that the mail has been sent and there was no bounceback email....so mail has been sent..

May be the user has not seen yet....so he said he will call the user and check with him if required he will let us know...

hence closing the ticket.....

TimeEntry.Title: SQL Backup Not Syncing to OneDrive
TimeEntry.Notes:
gged into the server to investigate why the SQL backup was not moving to OneDrive.

Verified that the backup was successfully completed on the SQL Server, but it was not syncing to OneDrive.

Checked the scheduled task and found an issue with the scheduler. Re-ran the scheduler manually and monitored the process.

After re-running, confirmed that the backup has now successfully moved to OneDrive.

TimeEntry.Title: My Remote version 25.9.9.9533 updated on CCC Servers
TimeEntry.Notes: Review the my remote portal, and found  the machine CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01 &  DESKTOP-4TTOOKT running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine  . Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 25.9.9.9533. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: SQL backup job failed; investigating the cause and taking necessary action
TimeEntry.Notes: The scheduled SQL backup job has failed. The issue has been identified during monitoring and requires investigation to determine the reason for the failure and to ensure that future backups run successfully and updated in one drive.

TimeEntry.Title: Virtual Disk consolidation required - CCC-DC-AD-01.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server CCC-DC-AD-01 is on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: Huntress Agent updated with Version V0.14.146 on CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following servers on is old version V0.14.132. Connected to the machines (CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01) from manage engine, download and installed the latest version V0.14.146. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Screenconnect Latest version (V 26.1.20.9571) updated on machine CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked and found that the computers machine CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01, were running an old version of ScreenConnect. update the software from the portal to the new version V 26.1.20.9571. After updating, verify that the version on the portal has been successfully updated to the latest version. Hence Closing this ticket .

TimeEntry.Title: CCC– Network Detective Report Generated and Updated Under Teams
TimeEntry.Notes: As per assigned task by lead, Network Detective reports were generated successfully for CCC Client. Checked and verified the reports are proper. Then uploaded the report to the appropriate client Teams channel for CCC. It is now ready for review and take actions on alerts.

TimeEntry.Title: Virtual Disk consolidation required - CCC-DC-TSVDI-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server ( CCC-DC-TSVDI-01 ) is on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully Then logged in to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine

TimeEntry.Title: Device Non-Compliant Due to Missing Patche CCC-DC-TSVDI-01,CCC-DC-AD-01,CCC-DC-SQL-02
TimeEntry.Notes:
Devices CCC-DC-TSVDI-01, CCC-DC-AD-01, and CCC-DC-SQL-02 were identified as non-compliant due to missing patches.

Logged in to the ManageEngine portal and verified pending updates on all affected systems. Proceeded with patch remediation by installing the following updates:

  • Microsoft Defender Antivirus – Version 1.445.699.0
  • Google Chrome (x64) – Versions 146.0.7680.153 / 146.0.7680.154

After installation, performed a manual patch scan on all systems to verify successful deployment and to clear the non-compliant status.

Post validation, confirmed that all patches have been successfully applied and no high vulnerabilities remain. All systems are now compliant as per patch management policy.

TimeEntry.Title: Screenconnect Latest version (V 26.1.20.9573) updated on machine CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Review the my remote portal, and found the machine CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01 running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine . Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 26.1.20.9573 After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Manage-Engine Latest version 11.5.2600.32.W updated on CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01
TimeEntry.Notes: Reviewed the RMM portal and identified that the CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01 were running an outdated version of ManageEngine. downloaded and installed the latest version (11.5.2600.32.W) of the ManageEngine agent. scan the system with the portal that the device now runs the updated agent version

TimeEntry.Title: Snapshot consolidation required - CCC-DC-SQL-02.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the following servers are on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully and then login to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine.

TimeEntry.Title: Cisco Secure Client(Version:5.1.16.194) Manual Update Required on DESKTOP-4TTOOKT,CCC-DC-SQL-02
TimeEntry.Notes: After reviewing the management portal, it has been identified that the following systems require manual updates:DESKTOP-4TTOOKT,CCC-DC-SQL-02.The following components need to be manually uploaded and installed:Cisco Secure Client & AnyConnect VPN (5.1.16.194) Manual installation required Cisco Secure Client Diagnostics and Reporting Tool (5.1.16.194)  Manual installation required Remote access will be used to download and install the required setup files on the affected systems. Once the installation is completed, a scan will be initiated through the management portal to verify that the systems reflect the latest version.

TimeEntry.Title: Offboarding of machine Kim-Laptop and upgradation to window 11
TimeEntry.Notes: As per assigned task by Rishad, removed Technijian tools and other applications from Kim-Laptop. Disjoined the machine from Domain and setup local profile.

TimeEntry.Title: migrate and clean the machine
TimeEntry.Notes: created a local account om the machine. Clean the machine from moving the files from domain profile to user profile. then setup the local account browsers with all the data without any loss, uninstall the application.

TimeEntry.Title: migrate and clean the machine
TimeEntry.Notes:
As per the handover, the KIM system required an upgrade to Windows 11.

Connected to the system and first installed all pending Windows 10 updates. After ensuring the system was fully updated, initiated the Windows 11 download and completed the upgrade.

Post-upgrade, verified the installation and installed all pending Windows 11 updates to ensure the system is fully up to date.

TimeEntry.Title: CCC– Network Detective Report Generated and Updated Under Teams
TimeEntry.Notes: As per assigned task by lead, Network Detective reports were generated successfully for CCC Client. Checked and verified the reports are proper. Then uploaded the report to the appropriate client Teams channel for CCC. It is now ready for review and take actions on alerts.

TimeEntry.Notes: Login to the vCenter and check the following machines CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01. needs to upgrade the VMware tool on it. Go to the VM and the initiate upgrade VMware tool on the machine successfully.

TimeEntry.Title: migrate and clean the machine
TimeEntry.Notes: Debra, had a call about the files. showed the user how to save the files from onedrive. moved the files.

TimeEntry.Notes:
Login to the vCenter and check the following machines needs to upgrade the VMware tool on it. Go to the VM and the initiate upgrade VMware tool on the machine successfully.

TimeEntry.Title: migrate and clean the machine
TimeEntry.Notes: We have successfully removed the domain account from your machine and transitioned you to a local account (Chuck Culp). All files from the domain profile have been migrated, and your browser data, including saved passwords and bookmarks, has also been transferred. Check the 365 and servers (CCC). create a quotation.

TimeEntry.Title: migrate and clean the machine
TimeEntry.Notes: Debra machine, remove the machine domain. copied the onedrive files to a hard drive. removed all the apps (technijian and culpco)
